_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of cyber adversary threat tier taxonomy (2014 National Intellegence Estimate [NIE]), DIA/NSA Standard Cyber Threat Model, etc.).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model evasion, model extraction, model inversion, membership inference, data poisoning, and prompt injection.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-003 (AG, cosine: 0.540), RM-T-002 (RM, cosine: 0.517).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.565). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, model, taxonomy]. DCWF-only terms [2014, adversary, cyber, dia, estimate, etc] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.830 (P=0.817, R=0.844). R exceeds P by 0.027 — the WIDAI KSA's 21 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 18 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.9%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of cyber adversary threat tier taxonomy (2014 National Intellegence Es" and "Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.579 ≈ STS 0.565 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, model, taxonomy] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, model, taxonomy]. DCWF-only: [2014, adversary, cyber, dia, estimate, etc]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 97.9% on Superset of classification. The matched KSA operates in a different professional domain than the obligation/competency requires. STS 0.565 passed the threshold but secondary signals contradict the match.
